message:
fix(region): update region.rs API calls to match current codebase

Fix API mismatches from the restored region.rs:
- heap.clear() → heap.reclaim_all()
- rref.index() → rref.heap_index()
- RRefError::RegionClosed → RRefError::AllocationInvalid
- RRefAccess bare trait → impl RRefAccess

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
